column1: # This inventory classifies every current Rust source, test, or example file
# under this crate that still contains Sempal-domain terminology. It is a
# repo-owned boundary artifact, not a planning backlog.
# - pattern: exact path under the Radiant crate, or a directory prefix ending in /**
# - owner: repo boundary responsible for the final disposition

column4: Sempal model action hotkey automation and DTO contracts must move to Sempal.
Native-shell compatibility tree must split generic primitives from Sempal shell composition and move/delete the rest.
Native Vello tree mixes generic runtime support with Sempal shell input render startup and test glue.
